scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @ai-evaluator/types && npm run build --workspace @ai-evaluator/config && npm run build --workspace @ai-evaluator/logger && npm run build --workspace @ai-evaluator/db && npm run build --workspace @ai-evaluator/integrations-github && npm run build --workspace @ai-evaluator/integrations-compass && npm run build --workspace @ai-evaluator/evals-promptfoo && npm run build --workspace @ai-evaluator/storage && npm run build --workspace @ai-evaluator/jobs && npm run build --workspace @ai-evaluator/ui
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @ai-evaluator/web && npm run build --workspace @ai-evaluator/worker
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @ai-evaluator/web && npm run lint --workspace @ai-evaluator/worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspace @ai-evaluator/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @ai-evaluator/worker
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @ai-evaluator/web && npm run test --workspace @ai-evaluator/worker
